title: DelegationMessage
description: Lead agent → role agent task assignment. Sent when the Lead decides a task (or a sub-task split from a larger request) should be handled by a specific role agent. The Lead adapts the user's original prompt to fit the target agent's competency and scope before delegating.

task.description: The full task object. Status should be PLANNING when first delegated.

contextExcerpts.description: Relevant code snippets, file contents, or architecture notes the Lead pre-read from the project to give the role agent context it might need but cannot access directly (outside its scope). Each string is a labelled excerpt: 'file:path — content'.

adaptedPrompt.description: The user's original request, rewritten by the Lead to match the target agent's role vocabulary and scope. This is what the role agent should act on.

constraints.description: Explicit constraints the role agent must respect. E.g. 'Do not modify any file outside src/components/', 'Must pass existing test suite', 'Keep backward compatibility with API v2'.
